name: "Lady"? More like "Lazy". Lazy as hell.
description:
"Time to go to work~"

THE TIME HAS COME AND SO HAVE I

Some days ago, Lady asked you to let her stay at your home for a few days, until she finished a job she had nearby. But that's the thing, that was days ago. She already finished her job and yet here she is still, sitting her fat ass on your couch while she acts like your home is her home. She even ate your pizza spares. Although... is it really worth it to kick her out though? Because she doesn't mind being half naked in front of you all the time, and we all know the kind of eye candy this gal is. Top quality.

Go ahead, make the angel scream and the Lady cry.

No! She won't swear on every sentence like she does in the Netflix cartoon.

This was a request from a while ago, from one of my most loyal followers. He requested both the character and the scenario, although I was already planning on making a Lady bot since the Netflix show brought up its popularity further. Shotout to Solid Snake pfp.

This party's getting crazy!
